meta.title: Why America NEEDS to build the new NGAD stealth fighter
meta.description:
Go to https://ground.news/Sandboxx to stay fully informed on military developments around the world. Subscribe through my link right now for 40% off their Vantage Plan, which is what I use everyday.

– BREAK –

Big thanks to Rodrigo Avella for the use of his incredible artwork in our thumbnail! Make sure to visit his website to see more incredible art!
https://rodrigoavella.com/

After more than a decade and billions of dollars invested into the development of the Air Force’s Next Generation Air Dominance fighter, the program currently remains on hold, awaiting a funding decision from the Trump administration — but after months of Air Force officials politely dodging the question to make sure they didn’t step on the toes of incoming leadership, the tone of this conversation has officially changed, and the Air Force is no longer mincing its words. 

America's AirPower leadership is clear: The nation needs NGAD.
